source_jobs.title: Senior Quality Engineer / SDET- Lahore, PK Based
source_jobs.description:
Lead the Future of Dentistry. 

Overjet is the world-leader in dental AI. Already, thousands of dental providers and insurers rely on our platform to deliver the best possible care. Now, we’re looking for talented people to fulfill our mission: improve oral health for all.

Overjet is where builders become leaders. Everyone here loves to make new things: new products, new partnerships, new content, and a new category of AI technology. And as Overjet grows ridiculously fast, so will you.

Simply put, there’s no better place to accelerate your career. Come join us!

The Role

We are looking for a Senior Quality Engineer (SDET) to help stabilize and scale the quality practices around our large .NET MAUI Windows application. The role focuses on building a sustainable testing strategy, implementing automated testing, and improving how we define and verify requirements. You will work closely with developers and product owners to ensure new features are designed with testability, clear acceptance criteria, and automated validation. This is a hands-on engineering role, not just manual testing.

Please note that while this role is remote, we are looking for candidates based in Lahore who can work EST hours.

Responsibilities

 -  Designing and implementing a sustainable testing strategy for a MAUI desktop app

 - Building and maintaining UI automation tests (WinAppDriver, FlaUI, UIA3)

 - Integrating automated tests into CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps / GitHub Actions)

 - Working closely with developers to ensure features are designed with testability in mind

 - Helping define clear, testable acceptance criteria for every story

 - Introducing quality metrics: test coverage, regression stability, build health

Qualifications

 - You're strong in C# and the .NET testing ecosystem

 - You have experience testing desktop applications (MAUI, WPF, WinUI, or similar)

 - You can write maintainable automation — code that developers actually want to keep

 - You've worked in Agile teams and collaborates well with engineers

 - You focus on preventing bugs, not just catching them

 - You can work independently and bring ideas, not just test cases

 - Bonus points for experience with
   
   1. .NET MAUI
   
   2. UI Automation / accessibility APIs
   
   3. WebSockets or real-time systems
   
   4. Introducing QA practices in teams that previously had little to none

Our Hybrid Workplace

We have a unique hybrid workplace at Overjet — which combines the teamwork of meeting in person, with the flexibility of working from anywhere.

Many of our positions are based in San Mateo, New York City, Boston, Salt Lake City, and Lahore. The Jetsetters who live in these “geo-hubs” come to the office on Tuesdays and Wednesdays, while having the option to work from home the rest of the week.

Our People Team is happy to answer any questions about what hybrid work means for your specific role!

Overjet's Values

 - Excellence: Aim Higher

 - Velocity: Quickly Deliver Results

 - Ownership: Go the Extra Mile

 - Win-win: Care Deeply

source_jobs.title: Senior C# / .NET Developer (Windows / MAUI)- Egypt Based
source_jobs.description:
Lead the Future of Dentistry. 

Overjet is the world-leader in dental AI. Already, thousands of dental providers and insurers rely on our platform to deliver the best possible care. Now, we’re looking for talented people to fulfill our mission: improve oral health for all.

Overjet is where builders become leaders. Everyone here loves to make new things: new products, new partnerships, new content, and a new category of AI technology. And as Overjet grows ridiculously fast, so will you.

Simply put, there’s no better place to accelerate your career. Come join us!

The Role

We’re looking for a developer who enjoys solving interesting engineering problems and building polished desktop software.

Our product is a Windows application built with .NET MAUI that integrates with other applications, processes real-time data via WebSockets, and focuses heavily on delivering a smooth, responsive user experience.

This is not a massive codebase, but it involves non-trivial technical challenges around integrations, automation, and performance. We’re open to mid-level to senior developers who are comfortable working in a product-focused environment and taking ownership of meaningful technical work.

While this is a fully remote role, we are looking for candidates based in Egypt for this position.

Responsibilities

 - Building and improving features in a Windows MAUI application

 - Integrating with external applications using UI automation and system-level interactions

 - Implementing and maintaining real-time communication via WebSockets
   
   - Ensuring the app feels fast, stable, and intuitive for users
   
   - Debugging and solving complex edge cases

Qualifications

 - You are strong in C# and .NET

 - You have experience with desktop development (MAUI, WPF, WinUI, or similar)

 - You're comfortable with async programming and concurrency

 - You enjoy solving tricky technical problems
   
   - You care about code quality, reliability, and user experience
   
   - You can work independently and contribute ideas, not just code

 - Bonus points for experience with
   
   - .NET MAUI
   
   - Windows desktop development
   
   - UI Automation / accessibility APIs
   
   - WebSockets or real-time systems
   
   - Integrating or orchestrating multiple applications
   
   - Debugging complex runtime issues

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer- Lahore, PK Based
source_jobs.description:
Lead the Future of Dentistry. 

Overjet is the world-leader in dental AI. Already, thousands of dental providers and insurers rely on our platform to deliver the best possible care. Now, we’re looking for talented people to fulfill our mission: improve oral health for all.

Overjet is where builders become leaders. Everyone here loves to make new things: new products, new partnerships, new content, and a new category of AI technology. And as Overjet grows ridiculously fast, so will you.

Simply put, there’s no better place to accelerate your career. Come join us!

The Role

We’re looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer to join our web team. This role is ideal for someone with solid full stack experience — regardless of specific framework background — as long as they’re confident working with ReactJS, Django, and PostgreSQL.

As a Senior Full Stack Engineer at Overjet Voice, you’ll play a key role in building and evolving our AI-powered dental platform. You’ll work across the stack — helping deliver fast, secure, and scalable features, while improving developer experience and infrastructure along the way.

This role requires someone who can contribute both frontend and backend, collaborate well with cross-functional teams, and write clean, maintainable code that balances speed and quality. We’re not looking for experts in a specific framework — we’re looking for engineers who are adaptable, resourceful, and care about building things right.

Please note that while this role is remote, we are looking for candidates based in Lahore who can work EST hours.

Responsibilities

 -  Design, build, and maintain scalable full stack features using React, Django, and PostgreSQL

 - Collaborate with product, design, and QA to deliver features that are thoughtful, performant, and easy to use

 - Write clean, testable, and well-documented code for both frontend and backend

 - Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and sprint planning

 - Identify and address performance bottlenecks, usability issues, and technical debt

 - Help maintain and evolve our APIs, data models, and client-side architecture

 - Ensure code aligns with best practices for security, accessibility, and responsiveness

Qualifications

 - 6–10 years of experience as a full stack engineer or similar role

 - Comfortable working with (or transitioning into) ReactJS, Django, and PostgreSQL

 - Strong understanding of API design, database performance, and component-based UI development

 - Clear and concise communication in English, especially in a remote team setup

 - Nice to have:
   
   - Background in healthcare, dental, or other regulated industries
   
   - Familiarity with HIPAA, GDPR, or other data privacy and compliance standards
   
   - Experience with authentication flows, user permission management, or third-party integrations
   
   - Familiarity with accessibility standards, performance optimization, or data-heavy UI
   
   - Exposure to AI-based or data-driven products
   
   - Experience mentoring or leading other engineers

Our Hybrid Workplace

We have a unique hybrid workplace at Overjet — which combines the teamwork of meeting in person, with the flexibility of working from anywhere.

Many of our positions are based in San Mateo, New York City, Boston, Salt Lake City, and Lahore. The Jetsetters who live in these “geo-hubs” come to the office on Tuesdays and Wednesdays, while having the option to work from home the rest of the week.

Our People Team is happy to answer any questions about what hybrid work means for your specific role!

 - Excellence: Aim Higher

 - Velocity: Quickly Deliver Results

 - Ownership: Go the Extra Mile

 - Win-win: Care Deeply

source_jobs.description:

We are expanding our sales team to accelerate Overjet’s growth in the private practice. As an Account Executive for our Private Practice segment, your efforts will help accelerate the discovery and adoption of dental AI to transform dentistry for the better.

Responsibilities

 - Identify potential customers by networking and extensive prospecting.

 - Gain a deep understanding of prospective clients to identify needs/pain points to effectively convey how AI would improve patient care and increase revenue.

 - Deliver effective sales presentations to C-suite and other key stakeholders.

 - Own the sales cycle from pitch to close and smoothly transition the customer to the assigned Customer Success Manager post close.

 - Forecast sales with a high degree of accuracy.

 - Achieve aggressive monthly, quarterly and annual sales goals.

 - Work in a collaborative, high-energy team environment.

Qualifications

 - Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience

 - 3+ years of B2B sales experience with at least 1+ years selling into healthcare

 - Self-starter with a solid track record of sales performance

 - Strong work ethic and hustle to achieve results in a high-growth environment

 - Ability to travel to customer meetings, company meetings and conferences as needed.

This is an incredible opportunity to help lead the future of dental care by building the operational foundation that lets our Sales, CS, and Marketing teams move faster and close better.

Responsibilities

 -  GTM Support & Deal Desk: Triage and resolve day-to-day systems issues across Salesforce and the broader GTM stack — including deal process questions, user access, opportunity routing, approvals, and ad hoc troubleshooting.

 - End-to-End Project Ownership: Independently manage small-to-medium GTM systems projects — gathering requirements, designing the solution, building, testing, documenting, and driving adoption.

 - Cross-Functional Partnership: Partner with Sales, Customer Success, Marketing, and Finance to gather requirements, improve workflows, and ensure changes land consistently across teams.

 - Experience troubleshooting integrations and sync issues across connected GTM tools (CPQ, Gong, Chili Piper, sales engagement platforms, etc.).

Simply put, there’s no better place to accelerate your career. Come join us!

The Role

Your mission will be to drive complex client launches from intake to revenue-live - the operational execution and orchestration engine that takes clients live and sets them up for success. You'll engage internal and client stakeholders, work with more autonomy in ambiguity, and deliver business-critical results.

Depending on the the proven experience, this role has the potential to be considered at the Senior Implementation Manager as well. Senior managers will carry higher expectations on delivery, senior stakeholder engagement, and the ability to drive the largest, most complex enterprise rollouts. You'll leverage a specialization in dental revenue cycle management (RCM) to drive relevant product launches end to end.

This position is fully remote, but we are looking for candidates based in Egypt, Pakistan, or the Philippines. US working hours are required.

Responsibilities

 - Own launch implementation end to end: from intake and kickoff through go-live and a short post-launch stabilization window.

 - Specialize in RCM: drive complex RCM product launches from intake through go-live with hands-on execution as a front-line RCM specialist, pulling in expert resources as needed.

 - Cross-functional Implementation Partner: provide the detail and deliver expertise to Sales and Success partners to build and manage effective client mutual action plans; ensure partners are consistently informed and enabled to successfully manage client relationships.

 - Orchestrate the rollout: organize Overjet's internal teams (e.g. Solutions Engineering, Training, Support, Clinical) and the client to get clinics live; sequence and manage the delivery chain to hit delivery timelines.

 - Run the operational execution: execute the steps required to get launches done across resourcing, scheduling, install, training, and readiness; keep momentum when things get messy.

 - Keep systems of record honest: own clinic-level reporting and action tracking, maintain clean and accurate records, keep Salesforce and trackers current, and move customers cleanly through the stage gates.

 - See around corners: Surface blockers and capacity risks early, proactively resolve issues, and help build the playbooks and automation that make the next launch faster.

Qualifications

 - A minimum of 1 year of RCM experience in the US based dental industry is a requirement.

 - Experience in implementation, onboarding, or project coordination, ideally in SaaS or healthcare tech.

 - Relentless follow-through: you keep many moving launches on track without dropping details.

 - Confident, client-facing communication with operational stakeholders (office managers, IT).

 - Comfort in fast-paced, ambiguous, high-growth environments: you create structure rather than wait for it.

 - Excellent internal communication and collaboration skills.

 - Fluency with Salesforce and spreadsheets, and an instinct to automate the repetitive.
